queue_item.action: Bind repeated target-browser interaction captures to exact source, deployment, device/browser, sequence, support, budgets, and retained capture digests without upgrading telemetry into proof.

progress.finding: Repeated trials are comparable only under stable source, deployment, device/browser, sequence, API-support, and budget identity. Each retained capture is digest-bound, and any failed trial remains visible rather than being averaged into success.
progress.verification: Five deterministic Node tests passed over byte-identical source before connector commit: valid packet, budget substitution rejection, support substitution rejection, digest tampering rejection, and failed-trial retention. No CI or target-browser run is claimed.

queue_item.handoff: Vercel Studio should create at least two production browser-interaction captures for one exact deployment and wrap them with this packet. Independently verify deployment identity and record the physical-device observation separately.

canonical_queue_update_policy: Append-only team-owned update; operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json was not overwritten.
next_action: Integrate the packet builder into the deployment-bound browser harness and add a CI gate that executes both the R-009 exact-evaluator integration test and this packet contract test.
